message:
🐛 Fix typos binary extraction in nightly org-wide checks (#89)

The typos v1.31.1 tar archive contains `./typos` (with ./ prefix),
not bare `typos`. Change tar extract path to match.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,7 +95,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           TYPOS_VERSION="v1.31.1"
           curl -fsSL "https://github.com/crate-ci/typos/releases/download/${TYPOS_VERSION}/typos-${TYPOS_VERSION}-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" \
-            | tar xz -C /usr/local/bin typos
+            | tar xz -C /usr/local/bin ./typos
 
       - name: Run typo check
         if: inputs.skip_typos != true
